data.title: Genesis Trading's token wallet deposited 1,482 ETH, worth $3.38 million, into the CEX.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Genesis Trading token wallets have just deposited a total of 1,482 ETH, worth $3.38 million, into Binance, OKX, and Bybit.

data.title: S&P Raises Oil Price Forecasts for 2026 and 2027
data.description: S&P has increased its price expectations for WTI and Brent crude oil by $15 per barrel for the remainder of 2026. According to Jin10, the forecast for 2027 has also been adjusted upward by $5 per barrel.

data.title: S&P: Raises WTI and Brent crude oil price forecasts by $15 per barrel for the remainder of 2026.
data.description: S&P announced it is raising its WTI and Brent crude oil price forecasts by $15 per barrel for the remainder of 2026 and by $5 per barrel for 2027, while maintaining its WTI and Brent crude oil price assumptions for 2028 and beyond. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ripple Expands Partnership with Bullish for Bitcoin Options Access
data.description: Ripple has strengthened its ongoing collaboration with Bullish, a digital asset exchange, to provide Ripple Prime clients with access to Bullish's Bitcoin options market. According to NS3.AI, this expansion aims to enhance the trading capabilities available to Ripple's clientele, offering them more opportunities in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Challenges in Reaching $80,000 Due to Options Market Forces
data.description: Bitcoin has been striving to reach the $80,000 mark but has encountered difficulties in breaking through. According to Bloomberg, a concealed factor within the options market is contributing to this struggle. The dynamics of the options market are influencing Bitcoin's ability to surpass this significant price level.

data.title: Trump: Naval blockade against Iran will not be lifted until the nuclear issue is resolved.
data.description: US President Donald Trump, in an interview with Israel's Channel 12 news channel today, stated, "I will not lift the naval blockade against Iran until an agreement is reached on its nuclear program." "In a sense, the naval blockade is more effective than bombing," the US president said, referring to the measure. "The Iranians are suffocating—like a fat pig. Things will only get worse for them. They cannot have nuclear weapons." Trump claimed, "The Iranians want reconciliation. They don't want me to continue the blockade." Trump further elaborated on the effectiveness of the naval blockade, saying, "Iran's oil reserves and pipelines will soon burst under the blockade." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Anthropic's Mythos Drives Crypto Security Beyond Audits Amid Aave Recovery Effort
data.description:
Anthropic's Mythos is advancing the capabilities of crypto security teams, extending their focus beyond traditional smart contract audits. According to NS3.AI, this development comes as a recovery initiative linked to Aave has successfully secured approximately $301 million in commitments following the Kelp DAO exploit. 

In other news, there are ongoing discussions about AI-agent payments and a proposed Bitcoin fork. Additionally, MoonPay is reportedly in the process of acquiring Sodot, while stablecoin advancements are being observed in both Hong Kong and Israel.

data.title: Polymarket Negotiates with CFTC to Lift U.S. Ban
data.description:
Polymarket, a prediction market platform, is in discussions with the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) to lift a four-year ban and reopen its Polygon blockchain-based platform to U.S. users, according to ChainCatcher. In 2022, Polymarket's parent company, Blockratize, was fined $1.4 million by the CFTC for operating an unregistered platform, leading to the ban on U.S. users.

The negotiations are notable because only CFTC Chairman Michael Selig is currently in office among the five commissioners, meaning he will make the decision alone. Selig has been a vocal supporter of prediction markets over the past year, warning against state government interference in February, issuing compliance guidelines in March, and cautioning against driving prediction markets offshore this month, which he believes could lead to an FTX-style collapse. However, the lack of consensus among commissioners raises concerns about potential policy reversals once the vacant seats are filled.

If approved, Polymarket's platform would be the first crypto-native platform under U.S. federal derivatives regulation, ending the gray area where users bypassed the ban using VPNs. Currently, neither Polymarket nor the CFTC has commented on the matter.

data.title: Hyperliquid plans to explore zero-commission challenges in the market prediction landscape, as seen with Polymarket.
data.description: Hyperliquid is accelerating its entry into the prediction market arena, planning to compete with platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi through its newly launched "outcome tokens" mechanism. According to its latest fee structure, Hyperliquid adopts a "zero-fee opening, fee-based closing or settlement" model for event trading, covering various scenarios including minting, trading, burning, and settlement. The platform also offers lower trading costs for "aligned quote tokens," including increased market-making rebates and fee discounts. This feature will be introduced through the HIP-4 upgrade, allowing users to trade binary contracts based on real-world events within the same account and integrating with the existing spot and perpetual contract system to form a unified trading environment. The prediction market has grown rapidly in recent years, with a total trading volume exceeding $63.5 billion by 2025. Hyperliquid's previously launched HIP-3 has already driven its permissionless perpetual contract market to account for over 35% of the platform's trading volume. The event token is currently in the testnet phase, and the mainnet launch date has not yet been announced. However, it is widely believed in the industry that it will become a crucial infrastructure for Hyperliquid to challenge the existing prediction market landscape. (CoinDesk)

data.title: UBS Adjusts Apple Price Target Ahead of Q2 FY26 Earnings Report
data.description: UBS has increased its price target for Apple to $287 from $280 in anticipation of the company's Q2 FY26 earnings report scheduled for April 30. According to NS3.AI, UBS analyst David Vogt has also revised his forecast for iPhone unit sales, predicting 50.3 million units. Vogt highlighted several risks that could impact Apple's performance, including product delays, weaker innovation, and macroeconomic challenges in China.

data.title: Hyperliquid Enters Prediction Market with Outcome Tokens
data.description:
Hyperliquid is accelerating its entry into the prediction market sector with the introduction of 'outcome tokens,' aiming to compete with platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi. According to Odaily, the newly disclosed fee structure for Hyperliquid involves a 'zero-fee for opening positions, fees for closing or settling' model, covering minting, trading, burning, and settlement scenarios. The platform also offers lower trading costs for 'aligned quote tokens,' including enhanced market-making rebates and fee discount mechanisms. This feature will be introduced through the HIP-4 upgrade, allowing users to trade binary contracts based on real-world events within the same account, integrating with existing spot and perpetual contract systems to create a unified trading environment.

The prediction market has seen rapid growth in recent years, with the overall trading volume exceeding $63.5 billion by 2025. Hyperliquid's previous HIP-3 launch has driven its permissionless perpetual contract market to account for over 35% of the platform's trading volume. Currently, the outcome tokens are in the testnet phase, with the mainnet launch date yet to be announced. However, industry insiders generally view this development as a crucial infrastructure for Hyperliquid to challenge the existing prediction market landscape.

data.title: The US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 1,933 BTC today, while the Ethereum ETF experienced a net outflow of 6,312 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 1,933 BTC today, the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 6,312 ETH, and the Solana ETF saw a net inflow of 1,922 SOL.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 76,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.03% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 29, 2026, 15:39 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 76,000 USDT and is now trading at 75,981.007813 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.03% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: WTI crude oil surged 6% intraday, hitting a new high since April 8.
data.description: According to Gate data, WTI crude oil surged 6.00% intraday, hitting a new high since April 8, currently trading at $107.49 per barrel. This followed data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) showing that the U.S. withdrew crude oil from its Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) in the latest week to its highest level since October 2022.

data.title: Analysts: Traders may reduce risk exposure ahead of the Fed decision.
data.description: Pepperstone analyst Michael Brown said traders are likely to reduce their exposure to risk assets ahead of the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision at 2 a.m. Beijing time on Thursday and earnings reports from US tech giants such as Microsoft, Alphabet (Google's parent company), Amazon, and Meta. He noted, "Given the looming risks of these events, many participants will want to cut their positions." He added that traders are also "realizing" there is still no good news regarding the Middle East conflict, with no sign of a US-Iran peace agreement and the Strait of Hormuz remaining blocked. (Jinshi)

data.title: Traders Anticipate Risk Reduction Ahead of Key Events
data.description: Pepperstone analyst Michael Brown has indicated that traders may reduce exposure to risk assets ahead of significant events. According to Odaily, the U.S. Federal Reserve is set to announce its interest rate decision at 2 a.m. UTC+8 on Thursday, alongside earnings reports from major U.S. tech companies such as Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, and Meta. Brown noted that many participants are likely to cut positions due to these impending risks. Additionally, traders are aware that there is no positive news regarding the Middle East conflict, with no signs of a peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran, and the Strait of Hormuz remains blocked.

data.title: Pantera Capital CEO Highlights Bitcoin's Undervaluation Amid AI Stock Surge
data.description: Pantera Capital CEO Dan Morehead has highlighted a significant undervaluation in Bitcoin, noting that it is currently trading 43% below its trend. According to NS3.AI, Morehead also pointed out that an internal index reveals leading AI companies are trading 33% above their trend. Despite broader adoption and regulatory advancements in the U.S., Morehead argued that institutional exposure to cryptocurrency remains limited, suggesting that the crypto market is still underpriced.

data.title: Robinhood's Crypto Revenue Declines in Q1 Amid Falling Trading Volume
data.description: Robinhood experienced a significant drop in its cryptocurrency transaction revenue during the first quarter, with a 47% decrease to $134 million. According to NS3.AI, the platform's crypto trading volume also fell by 48% to $24 billion, marking the third consecutive quarterly decline in crypto transaction revenue. Despite these challenges, Robinhood reported earnings per share of $0.38 and total revenue of $1.07 billion. Additionally, the company's net income saw a year-over-year increase of 3%, reaching $346 million.

data.title: Market pricing suggests that expectations for a Federal Reserve rate cut before 2027 have cooled significantly.
data.description: Kalshi's market pricing forecasts indicate that the market now sees only about a 50% probability of a Federal Reserve rate cut before 2027, a significant drop from the 80-90% probability earlier this year. As the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meets, the market is effectively pricing in a "higher interest rate environment for a longer period," suggesting a lack of confidence in near-term monetary easing.

data.title: Pentagon Reports $25 Billion Spent on Iran Conflict
data.description: The Pentagon has reported that the United States has spent approximately $25 billion on the conflict in Iran. According to Odaily, this information was disclosed during a hearing of the U.S. House Armed Services Committee. Acting Inspector General of the Department of Defense, Hurst, provided the most comprehensive cost estimate to date, informing lawmakers that the majority of the funds were allocated for ammunition. U.S. Secretary of Defense, Hegseth, also attended the hearing to provide testimony.
